and com like the God of wealth. (3) He will be honoured
by his worthy and famous younger brothers, possessed of
exceptional valour, wedded to his duty to the State and very
famous like Sri Rama. (4) He will be rich in cattle, wealth
and corn, will have a grand mansion full of relatives, a noble
wife, jewels, beautiful garments, ornaments, a very respectable
position, will be always happy, have many vehicles, be honoured
by kings, devoted to Gods and Brahmins and will cause wells
to be sunk and water-sheds to he put up by the road-side.

158 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
(5) He will have ideal family happiness, good personality, children
and wealth, will be famous, scholarly, sweet-tongued. a minister
of some king, respectable, and of a brilliant and sharp intelltect.
(6) He will curb his powerful foes by his superior prowess, will
be arrogant and cruel in his ways, having many scars on his
limbs, with a strong body and be quarrelsome. (7) He will be
